text:
(In reply to Michael Tuexen from comment #21)
Here is what I may have which just be causing it. I backed out my change from loader.conf and it went into panic immediately when I made an sctp connection.

I do have Vmware tools installed on both. Also running in GUI mode i.e. FreeBSD host is running gnome. Apart from that cant see any major differences. If you are still unable to reproduce, then I will re-try with a fresh install of both FreeBSD and Ubuntu
